behaviors.description: The review input is scoped to the lines that changed, not the full content of each modified file.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: (Unit) test only a diff-scope function with synthetic hunks; catches pure parsing mistakes but misses handoff bugs where the assembled review payload accidentally reattaches full-file content. (Integration) wire diff reader + scoping + review-payload builder with fixture diffs and assert only changed-line content is sent; this catches real module-boundary leakage. REAL-INFRA: no real OS/network/subprocess required by behavior text. LLM-DEP: no model-quality dependence. Rejection gate: rejected System/Agentic/Workflow because behavior text is only about input scoping ('scoped to the lines that changed'), not real HTTP nor model judgment.
behaviors.test_description: Run an in-process integration test that feeds multi-file patch fixtures through the same diff-read and payload-construction modules used in production, then assert payload snippets contain only changed-line regions (plus intended context) and never full-file bodies.

behaviors.description: Inline comments are attached to the correct positions in the diff view on the pull request.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: (Integration) mock GitHub API and verify computed position fields; catches local mapping logic errors but can miss real API/diff-position semantics mismatches. (System) post comments to a real PR and verify they land on intended diff lines; catches true position-contract failures that mocks can hide. REAL-INFRA and MOCK-HIDE both point to System because correctness depends on real PR diff-view anchoring behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Against a disposable real PR, post inline comments using known target lines from the actual patch and verify via API/UI metadata that each comment is anchored to the intended diff hunk/line.

behaviors.description: The agent identifies at least one real defect in a pull request that contains a known introduced bug.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: (Integration) stub model output with a canned defect; verifies plumbing only and always passes even if the real model misses the bug. (Agentic) run real model on a PR containing a seeded known defect and assert at least one valid defect is found; this is the actual failure boundary. LLM-DEP is explicit because correctness depends on model judgment. Rejection gate: rejected Workflow because behavior text asks for a single outcome ('identifies at least one real defect'), not multiple agentic decisions chained with inter-step model dependence.
behaviors.test_description: Use a benchmark PR fixture with a deliberately introduced bug and run the real analysis model; assert at least one returned finding correctly targets the seeded defect class/location.

behaviors.description: Every finding listed in the top-level summary corresponds to a posted inline comment ID from the same run.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: (Unit) test summary formatter mapping in isolation; catches local key/shape errors but misses run-state handoff bugs between comment posting results and summary assembly. (Integration) execute posting-result collection + summary builder with run-scoped IDs and assert one-to-one same-run linkage; catches cross-module consistency failures. REAL-INFRA: real network not required to expose this mapping bug; stubbed post responses are sufficient. LLM-DEP: none.
behaviors.test_description: In-process integration test over orchestrator components: simulate inline post responses with run-specific IDs, build summary payload, and assert each summary entry references an existing inline ID from that exact run and no foreign/stale IDs.

behaviors.description: No inline finding is dropped from the final summary payload before posting.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: (Unit) test list-transform function to preserve cardinality; catches local filter bugs but misses drops caused by orchestration between finding store, comment poster, and summary composer. (Integration) run the local pipeline from inline finding set through summary payload generation and compare sets/cardinality; catches real handoff loss. REAL-INFRA/LLM-DEP: not required by behavior text.
behaviors.test_description: Wire finding aggregator, inline-post result merger, and summary serializer in one in-process test; feed multiple findings (including edge cases) and assert final summary payload contains all inline findings exactly once before post call.

behaviors.description: The automation sequence (read diff, post inline comments, post summary) succeeds for a real pull request when provided a fixed precomputed finding set.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: (Integration) mock PR API and validate call order/payloads; catches orchestration logic issues but misses real API auth/rate-limit/schema/position behavior. (System) run against a real PR with fixed findings and verify end-to-end success; catches true infra/API failures. Rejection gate: rejected Agentic/Workflow because behavior text explicitly fixes findings ('fixed precomputed finding set'), removing model-output dependence.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the production sequence against a real test PR using deterministic precomputed findings; assert diff fetch succeeds, inline comments are accepted, summary posts, and run status is successful.

behaviors.description: The full live run with model-generated findings (read diff, analyze, post inline comments, post summary) completes correctly for a real pull request without manual intervention.
behaviors.justification: Candidate tests: (Agentic) test only real-model analysis quality on a PR; catches detection issues but misses downstream failures in posting/summary sequencing and recovery. (Workflow) execute full pipeline with real PR + real model-generated findings through all stages; catches cross-stage failures where model output shape/content affects posting and final summary completion. REAL-INFRA yes (real PR/API), LLM-DEP yes (model-generated findings), MULTI-STEP yes (analyze then post inline then summarize) so Workflow is the minimum boundary.
behaviors.test_description: Run unattended end-to-end on a disposable real PR with real model inference enabled; verify successful completion across stages, valid inline posts from generated findings, and final summary consistency with posted comments.
